chat_messages.text: How can I build a personal knowledge graph from my chat history?

You can parse chat exports into structured Markdown with YAML frontmatter, then use Obsidian's graph view to visualize connections. Tag conversations by topic and use wikilinks to create cross-references between related conversations.
What's the best way to organize an Obsidian vault for AI chat logs?

Organize by source (chatgpt/, claude/, gemini/ folders), use consistent frontmatter with tags, dates, and message counts. Enable the graph view with color groups per source for visual differentiation.
